listening.title: Listening: At the shop
listening.transcript: I want a small red bag and a big blue box. Do you have any tiny boxes? I prefer the wide ones, actually.

questions.question: The bag the customer wants is ___ and red.

listening.title: Listening: Checking your bag
listening.transcript: This is my key, and these are my glasses. Is this your phone? These tickets are for the concert. Where are my cards?
